description_long: This is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a dark metal receiver and barrel with a wooden stock and handguard. The rifle has a curved detachable magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and a prominent front sight post. The wooden components display a reddish-brown hue with visible grain, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. The trigger, magazine release, and safety lever are all visible, as are the gas tube and cleaning rod beneath the barrel. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with a fixed wooden stock and standard iron sights.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and curved magazine. The rifle features iron sights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, front sight post, and muzzle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length, wooden stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's end and the rifle's slim profile.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the receiver, magazine, trigger, and wooden furniture.
